input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to build the project in both Debug and Release configurations and create binlogs for each. Let me first look at the project files, then run the builds.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-62274fc45e164917bf3eeda9d3765f14 && dotnet build -c Debug /bl:Debug.binlog 2>&1 & PID1=$!; dotnet build -c Release /bl:Release.binlog 2>&1 & PID2=$!; wait $PID1; R1=$?; wait $PID2; R2=$?; echo "---"; echo "Debug exit: $R1, Release exit: $R2"; ls -lh *.binlog
